rulings.Case Title: COUNTY OF SAN MATEO VS. STATE BOARD OF EQUALIZATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgmnent On The Pleadings;Memo P&A; Declaration; Proof Of Service
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, SEPTEMBER 2, 2008, LINE 3, DEFENDANT CITY OF OAKLAND'S Motion For Judgmnent On The Pleadings IS GRANTED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF MUST ALLEGE A PRESENT CONTROVERSY APART FROM THE UNITED FUEL TAX. GRANTED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF MUST EXHAUST ITS ADMINISTRATIVE REMEDIES. DEFENDANT IS GIVEN LEAVE TO AMEND ITS ANSWER TO PLEAD THIS AS AN AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE ALTHOUGH IT IS THE COURT'S BELIEF THAT IT IS A JURISDICTIONAL ISSUE. CAMPBELL V. REGENTS OF UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA (2005) 35 CAL.4TH 311, 322 FN. 2. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Sanctions For Filing Of Frivolous Mtn For Summary Adjudication

rulings.Case Title: PATRICK HELLAND VS. RAY BRONNER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, SEPTEMBER 2, 2008, LINE 9, DEFENDANT RAY BRONNER'S MOTION TO STRIKE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. THE MOTION TO STRIKE THE 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR ABUSE OF PROCESS IS GRANTED. THE MOTION IS DENIED AS TO ALL OTHER CAUSES OF ACTION FOR FAILURE TO ESTABLISH PROTECTED ACTIVITY. PLAINTIFF SHIFTS THE BURDEN UNDER CCP SECTION 425.16. DEFENDANTS EVIDENCE FAILS TO OVERCOME THE LITIGATION PRIVILEGE THAT PROTECTS ALL FORMS OF CONDUCT THAT OCCUR IN LITIGATION AS LONG AS THE CONDUCT FURTHERS A PARTIES LITIGATION OBJECTIVE. SILBERG V. ANDERSON (1990) 50 CAL.3D 205, 212; NAVEILIER V. SLETTEN (2003) 106 CAL.APP. 4TH 763, 771. =(302/PJM/VC)

rulings.Case Title: IN RE: JORGE BARAJAS
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Petition For Leave To Proceed Without Claim Against The San Francisco Unified School District
